note: Pins are per-space: pinning a channel applies to the scoped spaces that have content in it at pin time; with no content anywhere in scope, the whole scope is pinned so the action never no-ops.

spacesToPinChannelFor.name: all-spaces pin applies to content-bearing spaces only
single active space pins that space when it has content
no content anywhere falls back to the whole scope
content outside the scope does not count
